subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! Behold how one slave hath stood at the door of another, seeking from him his freedom
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی اذا قام مملوک لدی باب مملوک اخری و اراد من هذا المملوک
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @independent investigation of truth; reality
